message:
fix(analytics): fix critical bugs in lesson tracking

Bug fixes:
1. CRITICAL: useLessonAnalytics refs now reset when navigating between lessons
   - Changed from hasTrackedView boolean to trackedLessonId comparison
   - Ensures each lesson is tracked when user clicks Next/Previous
   - Resets isCompleted state for new lessons

2. Fixed wrong conversion event on lesson completion
   - Changed from 'wizard_complete' to 'lesson_funnel_complete'
   - Added 'lesson_funnel_complete' to allowed conversion types
   - Prevents inflation of wizard completion metrics

3. Added guard in markComplete to ensure completion is for current lesson

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
